name: Zoodiac Ratpier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>二</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>モルモラット
name_jp_tl: Marmorat of the Twelve Zodiac Beasts
desc:
If this card is Normal Summoned: You can send 1 "Zoodiac" card from your Deck to the GY. An Xyz Monster whose original Type is Beast-Warrior and has this card as Xyz Material gains this effect.
● Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; Special Summon 1 "Zoodiac Ratpier" from your hand or Deck.
